nasb.text: Besides, she actually is my sister, the daughter of my father, but not the daughter of my mother, and she became my wife;

esv.text: Besides, she is indeed my sister, the daughter of my father though not the daughter of my mother, and she became my wife.

cnv.text: 何況她也實在是我的妹妹；她原是我同父異母的妹妹，後來作了我的妻子。

ccb.text: 况且，她真是我的妹妹，与我同父异母，后来做了我的妻子。

csbs.text: 况且她确实是我的妹妹，与我同父异母，后来作了我的妻子。
